name: Emoji Survival
short_description: Embark on an epic journey, facing thousands of enemies in our Emoji Roguelike
detailed_description:
😨 Emoji Survival 😨

Embark on an epic journey, facing thousands of enemies in our Emoji Roguelike

🎖️ Glory and Honor: Face endless waves of enemies.

🔄 Procedurally Generated: No two adventures are the same! Maps are randomly generated.

🌟Strategic Progression: Hone your skills, unlock powerful new weapons, and customize your playstyle as you progress, preparing yourself for the ever-increasing challenges that await in the depths.

⚔️ Epic Boss Battles: Challenge colossal emoji bosses.
